title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at NAREDCO

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at NAREDCO
jsonLd.description:
NAREDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NAREDCO:
NAREDCO is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NAREDCO!
